working_on: Cleanup-batch session: close Issue #52 — soft-warn category re-classification audit (29 remaining categories from S-0098 deferral). Per ADR 0057 user-buffered execution + ADR 0042 lifecycle.
outcome_summary: Closed Issue #52 — soft-warn category re-classification audit. Two commits beyond eager-claim: classification map (commit 97ce488) + ADR 0042 Consequences amendment (commit 2d42dcc). All 40 validator soft-warn categories classified into five buckets with concordance check passing on S-0077 + S-0098 prior assignments: 30 actively-tracked default + 5 deferred-fresh (S-0095 timestamp_helper_bypass + 4 S-0100 next_session_handle/outcome_summary categories) + 3 persistent-warn-annotated (S-0077 carry) + 2 informational-only-accepted (S-0098 carry) + 0 retire-candidates. Re-run methodology documented inline for the S-0117 cadence audit; no permanent helper tool per CLAUDE.md don't-add-features-beyond-task. Also fixed declared_scope shape to ADR 0049 Decision 1 string (cleared empty_declared_scope soft-warn). Validator: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns 374 (issue_collision -1 vs eager-claim baseline as #52 closed). MemPalace decision drawer at paideia/decisions/drawer_paideia_decisions_d66db8c7c6db77b7021c7283.
